message:
br-bd-65s0s expand SCENARIO_RESULT logging in fuse_e2e tests

Adds structured emit_scenario_result calls to six previously unlabeled
tests so their outcomes land in the SCENARIO_RESULT stream alongside the
existing 109 scenarios:
- fuse_mkdir_existing_directory_fails → EEXIST
- fuse_rmdir_missing_directory_fails → ENOENT
- fuse_rmdir_removes_empty_directory → entry_absent_after_rmdir
- fuse_rmdir_non_empty_fails → ENOTEMPTY_dir_preserved
- fuse_write_large_file → 64k_patterned_roundtrip
- fuse_spec_i3_write_and_persist_after_remount → payload_preserved
- fuse_spec_i5_delete_reclaims_free_counts → blocks_and_inodes_reclaimed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
